commit.message:
Fix bot 409 conflict: retry with backoff instead of crashing

When Telegram returns 409 (another getUpdates request), wait
5-30s and retry instead of crashing the process, which caused
Docker to instantly restart and repeat the conflict loop.

commit.message:
Redesign Daily Challenge section with animated DC card and streak tracker

Daily Challenge Card:
- Animated gold shimmer border sweeping left-to-right (CSS keyframe)
- Gold radial glow behind card title
- ★ DAILY CHALLENGE gold badge + 2× POINTS orange badge header
- Movie title in Bebas Neue, italic quote, actor + difficulty badge
- Live HH:MM:SS countdown "New challenge in" to UTC midnight
- "Open Scene →" gold button wired to openModal()
- Green completion overlay animates in after daily submit or on page load
  when profile shows daily_done_today=true

Streak Card (right of DC card on desktop, stacked on mobile):
- 🔥 fire emoji with CSS flicker animation (scale + skewX + brightness)
- Large orange streak number in Bebas Neue
- 7-day dot row: each column shows day abbreviation + dot state
    empty = not completed, ✔ done (orange), ★ today (pulsing orange ring)
- Milestone message adapts to streak count and whether today is done

Layout: CSS grid 1fr/240px on desktop, single column on mobile

JS:
- renderDailyCard(), renderStreakCard(), streakMessage(), showDailyComplete()
- loadStreakCard() fetches /api/profile on boot/login/register
- showPointsEarned() calls showDailyComplete()+renderStreakCard() on daily submit
- startDailyCountdown() reloads both daily + streak at midnight

commit.message:
Add Daily Challenge feature with streak tracking

Backend:
- get_daily_scene_id(): MD5 hash of UTC date string → deterministic scene for all users
- GET /api/daily: returns scene, date, bonus_multiplier, secs_until_reset
- DB migration: users.streak INTEGER, users.last_daily TEXT
- POST /api/submit: detects daily scene, awards 2× points, updates streak
  (streak increments if last_daily = yesterday, resets to 1 otherwise)
  returns is_daily, daily_bonus, daily_already_done, streak
- GET /api/leaderboard: includes streak per user row
- GET /api/profile: includes streak, daily_done_today, daily_scene_id

Frontend:
- Daily bar above scene grid: scene name + live HH:MM:SS countdown to UTC midnight
- Countdown auto-reloads daily data when it hits 00:00:00
- Gold "DAILY CHALLENGE" badge on the matching scene card
- "★ Daily · 2× pts" pill in recording modal header
- Points panel shows daily bonus amount + 🔥 N-day streak on completion
- Leaderboard: 🔥N streak badge next to username
- My Progress: streak shown in division card

commit.message:
Replace Web Audio waveform with 48-bar CSS-animated gold visualizer

- 48 gold bars (up from 30 red) using var(--gold) colour
- @keyframes wave-dance: flat (3px) → peak height → flat, infinite loop
- Each bar gets randomised CSS custom properties via JS:
    --wh  peak height 20–48px, arched higher at centre
    --wd  duration 0.45–1.1s
    --wdl negative delay -1–0s so bars are staggered at start
- Animation runs only when .waveform-wrap.on is present (during recording)
- Bars are invisible/flat when idle — no layout shift
- startWaveform() no longer needs stream arg; removed Web Audio draw loop

commit.message:
Security hardening: fix critical and high vulnerabilities

Critical:
- PayPal capture replay prevention (order ID idempotency via paypal_orders table)
- Server-side order-package binding (client no longer controls package at capture)

High:
- Add security headers (X-Frame-Options, HSTS, nosniff, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
- Remove X-Powered-By header
- Escape LIKE metacharacters in search + limit to 200 chars
- Validate parseInt results on repo ID params (reject NaN/negative)
- Handle PayPal auth errors gracefully

Medium:
- Fix vote count race condition (use COUNT(*) sync instead of increment/decrement)
- Fix boost credit race condition (atomic UPDATE WHERE credits >= 10)

commit.message:
fix: reparto "Guardando..." hang — remove FK join, add error handling

cargarReparto used FK join (usuarios!ventas_reparto_config_setter_id_fkey)
which can hang when setter_id is null. Replaced with plain select.
Also added error handling for the DELETE step in guardarReparto.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(deploy): pass appname to serve() to prevent duplicate module import

Root cause: FastHTML's serve() derives appname from filename stem ("main"),
then Uvicorn does `import main` which reimports app/main.py as a SECOND
module. The second module creates a different app/rt, so extracted routes
(compare_routes, estimate_routes) register on the wrong app instance.

Fix: Pass appname="app.main" explicitly so Uvicorn reimports via
sys.modules["app.main"] which is aliased to the original __main__ module.
Also removes temporary diagnostic print statements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove status dot indicator (purple dot and АЧААЛЛАЖ БАЙНА text)

Removes all statusDot/statusText elements, CSS, and JS references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip past frame 0 properly and handle totalPCMFrameCount=0 in FLAC decoder

Two root causes of noise and SKIP failures:

1. search_begin was audio_start+100, within frame 0's plaintext data.
   False encrypted sync matches inside frame 0 corrupted the XOR
   decryption, producing garbage audio (noise). Now uses STREAMINFO
   max_frame_size to skip past frame 0 entirely before searching.

2. Files with totalPCMFrameCount=0 (common in SpCA extracts) caused
   frames_to_read=0, so no decoding was attempted. Now falls back
   to max_frames (441000) when total is unknown.

* feat: allow super admins to invite team members

- Frontend: treat app_role='admin' as team owner in TeamsPage so they
  can see the Settings tab and use the invite UI
- Backend: invite-member edge function now checks caller's app_role
  and allows admins to bypass the team.created_by ownership check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: check team owner's plan (not caller's) when admin sends invite

The plan/billing check used userId (the caller) to look up the plan,
but when a super admin sends the invite, their profile has no paid plan.
Now uses team.created_by to check the actual team owner's plan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show actual error message in invite-member for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show actual error on invite failure instead of generic message

Catch network/CORS errors separately, handle non-JSON responses,
and show HTTP status code when error body is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: disable gateway JWT verification for invite-member edge function

The Supabase gateway was rejecting requests with 401 before our
function code ran, returning non-JSON without CORS headers. Our
function already handles JWT verification internally (lines 40-57),
so gateway verification is redundant and prevents proper error responses.

commit.message:
fix: prevent SSRF via tunnel request path validation

Validate and sanitize the request path from tunnel WebSocket frames
before constructing the local HTTP request. Parse the path as a URL
and reject it if it contains a scheme or host component, then use
url.ResolveReference to safely construct the target URL against the
base opencode URL.

Fixes CodeQL alert go/request-forgery (CWE-918).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Multi-stem audio: layer 6 stems with scroll-based fades

Replace single background track with 6 decoded AudioBuffer stems
(beat, strings, hihat, whistle, shakuhachi, steel pan) that all
start at the exact same AudioContext.currentTime for sample-accurate
sync. Per-stage gain fades build the mix as you scroll:
GROUND=strings, SECOND=+hihat, THIRD=+beat+whistle, SUMMIT=all.
Existing filter/reverb/delay effects chain preserved.

commit.message:
feat: integrate deterministic authentication bootstrap system

ARCHITECTURE FIX: Eliminates race conditions in authentication flow

This commit integrates the deterministic authentication bootstrap system
into App.tsx, replacing the old initAuth() pattern that could race with
background token refresh.

## Changes

**NEW FILES:**
- `ARCHITECTURE_AUTH_BOOTSTRAP.md` - Complete architecture documentation
- `client/src/lib/auth/AuthBootstrap.ts` - Sequential bootstrap orchestrator
- `client/src/hooks/useAuthBootstrap.ts` - React integration hook
- `client/src/lib/api/apiFetch.ts` - Fetch wrapper with automatic 401 retry
- `client/src/lib/auth/RefreshCircuitBreaker.ts` - Circuit breaker pattern

**MODIFIED:**
- `client/src/App.tsx` - Replaced useAuthStore.initAuth() with useAuthBootstrap hook
  - Eliminates race condition where initAuth + background refresh run concurrently
  - Added error state UI for bootstrap failures
  - Simplified boot sequence with deterministic flow

## Boot Sequence (NEW)

1. Check if cookies exist (client-side)
2. If no cookies → UNAUTHENTICATED (done)
3. If cookies exist → Try GET /api/auth/me
4. If 401 → Refresh token ONCE
5. If refresh OK → Retry /api/auth/me
6. Start background services (WebSocket, periodic refresh)

## Guarantees

✅ No race conditions (single execution lock)
✅ No double refresh (refresh only on bootstrap, not background)
✅ Automatic retry on 401 (built into sequence)
✅ WebSocket starts AFTER auth ready
✅ Production-safe (circuit breaker, timeout handling)

## Testing

Build verification: ✅ npm run build:client succeeds
No type errors in modified files

commit.message:
Implement Silverskin Armor (MBS #132) with new reusable GrantCardTypeEffect

Equipment that grants +1/+1 and makes equipped creature an artifact in
addition to its other types. Introduced GrantCardTypeEffect as a new static
effect (analogous to GrantColorEffect/GrantSubtypeEffect) wired through the
full static bonus pipeline: StaticBonusAccumulator, StaticBonus record,
StaticEffectResolutionService handler, PermanentViewFactory, and
GameBroadcastService. Updated GameQueryService with gameData-aware
isArtifact() overload so metalcraft counting and predicate matching
correctly recognize statically granted card types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 将 NSIS 安装目录添加到 PATH 以修复 makensis 命令未找到

问题：
- NSIS 安装成功，但 makensis 命令不在 PATH 中
- Chocolatey 将 NSIS 安装到 C:\Program Files (x86)\NSIS
- 该目录不在系统 PATH 中，导致 makensis --version 失败

修复：
- 更新缓存路径以包含完整的 NSIS 安装目录
- 在安装后将 NSIS 目录添加到 GITHUB_PATH 环境变量
- 在验证步骤中也添加 NSIS 到 PATH（从缓存恢复时）
- 更新缓存键为 mingw-nsis-v2 以避免使用旧缓存

测试：
- 安装步骤: choco install mingw nsis -y && 添加 PATH
- 验证步骤: 从缓存恢复 && 添加 PATH
- 两个步骤都执行 makensis --version 验证可用性

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add GitHub Actions workflows for GitHub Pages deploy previews (#5)

- deploy-main.yml: syncs main branch to the root of gh-pages on every push,
  preserving any pr-* preview subdirectories
- deploy-preview.yml: on PR open/update, deploys the PR branch to
  gh-pages/pr-{number}/ and posts a comment with the preview URL; on PR
  close, removes the preview directory

https://claude.ai/code/session_013ryw2EuimseQRtz3qyRFN7

commit.message:
feat: User CRUD + Pipeline Delete + 181 Admin-Tests

- UsersRolesSection komplett neu: Erstellen, Bearbeiten, Löschen,
  individuelle Modul-Berechtigungen pro User mit Rollen-Defaults
- Pipeline-Verwaltung: Delete Pipeline + Delete Bucket mit Confirm-Dialog
- Backend: POST/PUT/DELETE /users, DELETE /pipelines, DELETE /pipelines/:id/buckets/:bucketId
- Reorder-Route vor :bucketId verschoben (Express route-order fix)
- 73 neue Tests: users.test.ts (19), pipelines.test.ts (16), admin.test.ts (38)
- CRM-Integration Tests: Referenzielle Integrität zwischen Modulen geprüft
- Gesamt: 181 Tests, alle grün

commit.message:
在庫ステータスとリマインダーを一本化: average_consumption_daysを廃止しexpenses.reminder_daysに統合

inventory.average_consumption_daysを廃止し、在庫ステータス計算を紐づく最新支出の
expenses.reminder_daysから行うように変更。これにより通知設定と在庫ステータスが
連動し、ユーザーが二重に設定する必要がなくなる。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
